query: SELECT id, action, details, created_at FROM activity_log WHERE (details LIKE '%llm%' OR details LIKE '%LLM%' OR details LIKE '%error%' OR details LIKE '%fail%' OR action LIKE '%scan%' OR action LIKE '%llm%') AND created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 30
